history.note: m1.profileLocked set to true. 10 raw niche candidates surfaced.
m2a.scoresLocked set to true. Top 3 finalists: Roofing (26), Landscaping (25), Pool & Gutter (22). Gym/Fitness swapped out by student override -- low ticket filter.

m2b.researchComplete set to true. 7 sub-task markdowns + synthesis.md written for all 3 niches. Total Apify cost: ~$1.69. Actors used: google-search-scraper, crawler-google-places, reddit-scraper-lite.

m2c.nicheDecided set to true. Chosen niche: roofing. Positioning: low-ticket one-time build ($1,000-2,000) with AI chatbot. Targets smaller roofers who cannot afford Hook Agency/King Contractor retainers.

m2d.templateBuilt and factory.generated set to true. 12 phases complete. Winner: perth-roof-replacements. 17 components, 12 pages, full niche playbook, SOPs, agents, checklists. All 4 hard gates passed (Gates 1-3 + 6). Gates 4+5 warnings only. Registered in website-factory/config/template-routes.json.
m4.factoryStructureLoaded set to true. Website_Factory_Structure.md written. 13-stage pipeline documented. 1 registered niche template (roofing). 17 universal SOPs mapped. Intake fields identified.

m3.offerLocked set to true. Offer pack written to research/03-offer-pack.md. Stage 2 offer shape. Positioning: turn review-checkers into estimate requests. 3 DM versions (short/medium/long). 5 personalized prospect DMs. Pricing: $0 first case study (uncle), $1,000-1,200 clients 2-3, up to $2,000 at clients 7+.

Niche slug changed from roofing to roofing-full. m2d.templateBuilt + factory.generated reset to false. Goal: build a second parallel template at templates/roofing-full/ from higher-ranked 30-40 page sites (40-60/100 SEO score). Existing templates/roofing/ (single-page landing template, winner: perth-roof-replacements) preserved untouched at template-routes.json entry roofing.
